stories.title: Rory fires 74 at PGA, curses waywardness off tee
stories.summary: Rory McIlroy lamented his play off the tee -- hitting just five of 14 fairways -- as he bogeyed his final four holes for a 4-over 74 at the PGA Championship.

stories.title: NBA: Refs right in no-call at end of Cavs-Pistons
stories.summary: The NBA said Thursday that officials were correct in not calling a foul on Jarrett Allen in the closing seconds of regulation of Game 5 between the Cavaliers and Pistons on Wednesday night.

stories.title: Rahm apologizes for 'inexcusable' incident at PGA
stories.summary: Jon Rahm apologized for hitting a volunteer in the face and shoulder with a divot after he took a swing in frustration during the first round of the PGA Championship on Thursday.

stories.title: Mbappé benched, booed: Coach said I'm 4th-choice
stories.summary: Kylian Mbappé said on Thursday Álvaro Arbeloa told him he was Real Madrid's "fourth-choice forward" after being benched and then whistled by fans.

stories.title: M's Raleigh lands on IL for first time in career
stories.summary: The Mariners placed catcher Cal Raleigh on the 10-day injured list on Thursday morning with a right oblique strain, the first IL stint of the AL MVP runner-up's career in his sixth major league season.
